steps.title: Use substitution
steps.content: The first equation already gives $y=-3x$. Substitute that into the second equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choices A and B are too small because substituting them gives $4x-3x=x$, not $15$.
  • Choice C, $15$, satisfies the system. Correct.
  • Choice D, $45$, is the absolute value of the corresponding $y$-value, since $y=-45$ when $x=15$.
That matches choice C.
